briefdescription.para: Base address for remap vector descriptor 0.
Secondary address for remap vector descriptor 0.
Start address for source buffer in memory.
Start address for destination buffer in memory.
Maximum size allocated for 4K frame in memory.
Frame size in bytes for 1920x1080 resolution.
Frame size in bytes for 4K resolution.
Value of Pi constant for warp initialization.
Shift value for lens distortion fixed-point conversion.

detaileddescription.para: This function converts user-provided warp configuration parameters into driver-specific configuration format for both warp initialization and warp filter operations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to driver configuration structure
is a pointer to input warp configuration
